final_message:
Perfect. Both files are complete and meet all constraints:

**REPORT.md:**
- ✓ Four H2 headings in exact order: Overview, Top Products, Regional Performance, Recommendations
- ✓ 126 words total (well under 250)
- ✓ Overview states total revenue as $7,154.44 and 30 orders
- ✓ Three recommendations bullets (15, 11, 12 words each)
- ✓ No forbidden words (leverage, delve, robust, seamless, revolutionize)

**summary.json:**
- ✓ Exactly five keys: total_revenue, orders, median_order_value, top_product_by_revenue, revenue_by_region
- ✓ total_revenue: 7154.44 (rounded to 2 decimals)
- ✓ orders: 30 (integer)
- ✓ median_order_value: 204.94 (rounded to 2 decimals)
- ✓ top_product_by_revenue: "Gadget"
- ✓ revenue_by_region: complete mapping for all four regions
